name: SQL Injection Attempt Against Public Application
description: Detects SQL injection patterns in web requests targeting public-facing applications
query:
// Detect SQL injection attempts in proxy/web logs
// Trigger on URL patterns containing SQL keywords
events from proxy
where url matches "(?i)(union.*select|or.*1.*=.*1|drop.*table|insert.*into|exec.*xp_)"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 5
within 60 seconds
